hero.title: 6 Days, Kashmir & the Taj.
hero.titleAccent: The Full Valley Plus India's Icon.
hero.intro: Six days to experience Kashmir in full, Gulmarg, Pahalgam and Dal Lake, then fly south for the Taj Mahal and Agra. The complete pairing of mountain paradise and Mughal masterpiece.

breadcrumb.label: 6 Days Best of Kashmir + Taj Mahal

hero.heroImageAlt: Kashmir valley and Taj Mahal best of tour

overview.heading: 6 Days Best of Kashmir + Taj Mahal: The Full Picture
body: This 6 day package is the most complete Kashmir and Taj Mahal combination. You experience the three jewels of the Srinagar valley, Gulmarg's gondola, Pahalgam's valleys and Dal Lake's houseboats, before flying south to see the Taj Mahal at sunrise and explore Agra.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, the trip includes the domestic flight and a private vehicle with driver guide throughout. The extra day over the 5 day version means a more relaxed pace in Kashmir, with time for both Gulmarg and Pahalgam alongside Srinagar.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: Gulmarg & Pahalgam
items.body: The gondola at Gulmarg and the alpine valleys of Pahalgam, two of Kashmir's most beautiful mountain destinations, both included at a relaxed pace.

items.title: Dal Lake Houseboat
items.body: A shikara ride and a houseboat night on Srinagar's Dal Lake, surrounded by Mughal gardens and snow-capped peaks.

items.title: The Taj Mahal at Sunrise
items.body: After the mountains, the marble. See the Taj Mahal glow at dawn and explore the mighty Agra Fort.

days.title: Arrive Srinagar, Houseboat
days.description: Met at Srinagar airport and transferred to your Dal Lake houseboat. Evening shikara ride.

days.title: Gulmarg Excursion
days.description: Drive to Gulmarg for the gondola and mountain scenery.

days.title: Pahalgam Excursion
days.description: A full day in the valleys of Pahalgam.

days.title: Srinagar Sightseeing, Fly to Delhi
days.description: Mughal gardens, then fly to Delhi and drive to Agra.

days.title: Taj Mahal Sunrise, Agra Fort, Delhi
days.description: Sunrise at the Taj, Agra Fort, then back to Delhi.

days.title: Depart Delhi
days.description: Checkout and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: Kashmir and the Taj, the Complete Pairing
whyBook.body: Six days lets you enjoy Kashmir's full valley before the Taj, without rushing. We sequence the mountains, the flight and the monument so it all flows. Dhesu has arranged India tours for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Best of Kashmir & Taj Mahal Tour from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 6 day package is the most complete way to combine Kashmir with the Taj Mahal. It covers the full Srinagar valley, Gulmarg, Pahalgam and Dal Lake, before the Taj and Agra.

The extra day over the 5 day version means a relaxed pace in Kashmir, with both major mountain excursions included.

A private vehicle, a houseboat night, a domestic flight and a sunrise Taj visit make it a rich, memorable trip.

sections.heading: Why Six Days for Kashmir and the Taj
sections.body:
Shorter versions of this trip have to choose between Gulmarg and Pahalgam. The 6 day package includes both, plus Srinagar, so you experience the full range of the valley.

You still get the Taj Mahal at sunrise and Agra Fort, with the domestic flight linking the two regions efficiently. It is the ideal length for travellers who want both icons properly.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Srinagar and Delhi Airports (SXR / DEL). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: What does the 6 day version add over the 5 day?
items.answer: The 6 day package includes both Gulmarg and Pahalgam in Kashmir, plus Srinagar sightseeing, for a more complete and relaxed valley experience, before the Taj Mahal and Agra. The 5 day version focuses on one main mountain excursion.

items.question: Is the domestic flight included?
items.answer: Yes. The package includes the domestic flight from Srinagar to Delhi, linking Kashmir with Agra and the Taj Mahal. International flights are not included.

items.question: What is the best time for this trip?
items.answer: April to October suits Kashmir, with spring gardens, summer greenery and autumn colours. October to March is best for Agra and Delhi. Spring and autumn offer good weather across both regions.
